title: Lands acquired at tax sale
doc_html:
§94.  Lands acquired at tax sale

This Chapter shall not apply to lands adjudicated to the state at tax sale, until the expiration of three years from date of recordation of the tax deed evidencing the adjudication.

§94.  Lands acquired at tax sale
